prompt: A breathtakingly enchanting, hyper-realistic photograph of a beautiful radiant spiritual shaman queen playing a sacred shamanic drum in a lush tropical garden. She is the same exact woman from the reference images — reproduce her face with photographic precision in the most flattering, luminous natural light. Her skin glows with warm inner radiance. Her expression is one of deep spiritual trance and power — eyes closed, head slightly tilted, mouth slightly open as she chants a sacred invocation, her face radiating transcendent beauty, raw spiritual ecstasy, and ancient wisdom. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho from the reference: a large flowing V-neck poncho made entirely of hand-crocheted yarn in vivid rainbow horizontal stripes — pink, hot pink, green, emerald, blue, sky blue, yellow, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white stripes creating a stunning V-pattern from the neckline down. The poncho has colorful multicolored crocheted tassels and fringe along the entire bottom edge in matching rainbow colors. The crocheted texture is clearly visible — open-stitch crochet pattern showing the handmade yarn work. Same white wrapped turban on her head with the ornate golden braided band and the oval turquoise-green gemstone centered at the forehead. POSE AND ACTION: She holds a large traditional shamanic frame drum — a round wooden-framed hand drum with natural animal skin membrane, approximately 40cm diameter — in her left hand, holding it upright at chest level. Her right hand strikes the drum with a wooden beater, captured at the exact moment of impact. ENERGY AND VIBRATION EFFECTS: From the point where the beater strikes the drum skin, visible concentric rings of golden luminous energy ripple outward through the air — sacred sound waves made visible as shimmering golden light ripples expanding in circles from the drum. Tiny golden and rainbow-colored particles of light float and dance in the air around her, vibrating with the rhythm of the drum. The colorful yarn of her poncho seems to glow and shimmer with each vibration. Dramatic god rays of warm golden sunlight pierce through the tropical palm fronds above, converging around her. The tropical garden setting has lush green palm trees, tropical foliage, and natural earth path. The golden hour light creates an ethereal, magical atmosphere — the sacred sound of the drum made visible as pure light energy radiating outward. Lens flare adds to the divine enchantment. Shot on professional DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 160. Slightly low angle looking up at her, majestic perspective. Shallow depth of field, face and drum razor-sharp, tropical background melting into dreamy golden bokeh. This is a sacred moment of the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — the shaman calling the spirits with the heartbeat of the earth.
